programmes.show_name: Love At The Movies! With Pat Sharp
programmes.show_description: Grab the biggest tub of popcorn, snuggle up to your loved one and expect plenty of smooching in the back row as Pat Sharp has a session of '80s movie magic, all on the theme of lurve!
Popcorn at the ready, these are NOW 80s' biggest songs from the movies. But don't forget to switch off those mobile phones!
A classic decade of movie hits - and these are 40 of the best. Including Tina Turner, James Brown, Queen, Simple Minds and Duran Duran. Plus a bit of Dirty Dancing!
